data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether the waiting room feature is enabled by default, as specified in the requirement. However, the evidence only describes a scenario where the waiting room is utilized during a session but does not confirm that it is enabled by default for all meetings. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as there is no explicit evidence that the waiting room setting is applied universally across the system.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the waiting room is enabled by default for all meetings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify default waiting room setting
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the waiting room feature is set to enabled by default.
